dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires two consecutive days of higher highs and higher lows. The first condition (high > prev_high) combined with entry logic AND will be evaluated on bar N, and the engine must verify the previous bar also had high > prev_high. The third condition uses dc_upper (Donchian upper band over 20 periods) as a proxy for 'the high of the current downtrend' since no explicit downtrend high indicator is available. Exit uses a reversal condition (close below prior low) as AUTHOR_SILENT was specified.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires two consecutive days of higher highs and higher lows. The first condition (high > prev_high) combined with entry logic AND will be evaluated on bar N, and the engine must verify the previous bar also had high > prev_high. The third condition uses dc_upper (Donchian upper band over 20 periods) as a proxy for 'the high of the current downtrend' since no explicit downtrend high indicator is available. Exit uses a reversal condition (close below prior low) as AUTHOR_SILENT was specified.

source_rule_text: Enter a long trade when two consecutive days show both higher highs and higher lows, confirmed by prices moving above the high of the current downtrend.
